title: Exobiology Earnings
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(Value + Bonus), 0) AS totalReward FROM SellOrganicData_BioData bod JOIN SellOrganicData sod ON sod.event_id = bod.SellOrganicData_event_id WHERE sod.event_timestamp >= :startDate AND sod.event_timestamp < :endDate

details.help: Value + first-discovery bonus from SellOrganicData transactions
